// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// POSTPageToggleSwitch references /toggle/{on}/
func POSTPageToggleSwitch(on bool) string {
	s_on := strconv.FormatBool(on)
	var b strings.Builder
	b.Grow(len("@post('/toggle/") + len(s_on) + len("/')"))
	b.WriteString("@post('/toggle/")
	b.WriteString(s_on)
	b.WriteString("/')")
	return b.String()
}
